'''Arundel''' was a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] who discovered that [[Iona Retter]] was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] spy. It was because of this that she had to leave her position in [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]], and so she vowed revenge against Arundel.

{{Char-stub}}
